articles.title: Starbucks, Amgen, CVS and Other Stocks Help This Income Fund Shine
articles.summary: Hilda Applbaum, co-manager of the American Funds Income Fund of America, employs a strategy of investing in inexpensive, high-yielding stocks with potential for growth. This approach has led to her fund outperforming 98% of its peers. The article highlights how stocks like Starbucks, Amgen, and CVS contribute to the fund's success.

articles.title: Starbucks Founder Leaves Washington State With Millionaire Tax Rattling the Rich
articles.summary: Starbucks Corp. founder Howard Schultz has announced his departure from Washington state to move to Miami, citing family reasons after more than four decades. His move comes as Washington state lawmakers are actively debating a proposed "millionaire's tax," which has caused concern within the Seattle business community. Although Schultz did not explicitly mention taxes, his departure coincides with the impending enactment of the state's first income levy.

Although Schultz did not explicitly mention taxes, his departure coincides with the impending enactment of the state's first income levy.

articles.title: How to watch Starbucks' 2026 virtual shareholder meeting
articles.summary: Starbucks Coffee Company (NASDAQ: SBUX) will hold its Annual Meeting of Shareholders virtually on Wednesday, March 25, 2026, at 10:00 a.m. Pacific Time. Shareholders on record as of January 16, 2026, are eligible to vote and can access the meeting via investor.starbucks.com. A replay of the meeting will be available on the company’s website until October 28, 2026.
